title: Tallon Large Christmas Advent Calendar - Santa Design with Postal Envelope - 2 Assorted Designs, 1 Sent at Random - Traditional DIY Advent Calendar
features: Classic Santa Design – Featuring a traditional Santa scene, this advent calendar brings a nostalgic, festive charm to your Christmas countdown.
DIY Advent Calendar – Personalise each day’s surprise, making the build-up to Christmas extra special for children and adults alike.
Postal Envelope Included – Comes with a postal envelope, making it easy to send as a thoughtful Christmas gift to family and friends.
Ideal for All Ages – Perfect for both children and adults who enjoy traditional Christmas themes and DIY advent calendars.
Christmas advent calendar Santa advent calendar DIY advent calendar traditional advent calendar postal advent calendar advent calendar with envelope
description: Celebrate the countdown to Christmas with this Tallon Large Santa Design Advent Calendar. Featuring a traditional and charming Santa scene, this DIY advent calendar allows you to add a personal touch each day, building excitement for Christmas. It comes with a postal envelope, making it a lovely gift option to send to loved ones. With two assorted designs sent at random, each calendar is a surprise and is perfect for anyone who loves classic festive décor. A nostalgic addition to any home, this calendar brings joy throughout the season.
